_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of hair shaft progenitors that create a niche for hair pigmentation.

_contextSnippet: Invariably, all Scf mice (flox/gfp; Krox20Cre n = 20) displayed progressive hair graying. The first round of hair graying occurred homogenously during postnatal days 30–40 (P30–P40).
details: Complete loss of hair pigmentation when deleted in Krox20 lineage cells, with progressive hair graying occurring homogenously during postnatal days 30-40
